det_check_template:
proof fn det_page_to_endpoint_with_thread_and_container(owning_container: ContainerPtr, owning_thread: ThreadPtr, endpoint_idx: EndpointIdx, page_ptr: PagePtr, page_perm: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, r1: (EndpointPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<Endpoint>>), r2: (EndpointPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<Endpoint>>))
    requires (page_perm@.is_init()), (page_perm@.addr() == page_ptr),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r1.1@.addr() == r1.0)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().queue.wf())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().queue.unique())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().queue@ =~= Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().queue_state =~= EndpointState::SEND)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().rf_counter =~= 1)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owning_threads@ =~= Set::<(ThreadPtr, EndpointIdx)>::empty().insert(
            (owning_thread, endpoint_idx),
        ))
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owning_container == owning_container)
            &&& (r2.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r2.1@.addr() == r2.0)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().queue.wf())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().queue.unique())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().queue@ =~= Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().queue_state =~= EndpointState::SEND)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().rf_counter =~= 1)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owning_threads@ =~= Set::<(ThreadPtr, EndpointIdx)>::empty().insert(
            (owning_thread, endpoint_idx),
        ))
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owning_container == owning_container)
        }) ==> det_page_to_endpoint_with_thread_and_container_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
